race.comment: KANAS MTOTO (4) resumed for the new yard with a 0.6 length defeat over 1000m at Belmont Park. Has an inside gate and improvement to come. Has a 1.5kg claim and sets a decent standard. SPECIAL COUNSEL (6) resumes for the top metro stable and just missed in his most recent Lark Hill trial. The blinkers and tongue tie go on for the first time, and he's likely to come back much improved. RIGATONI (9) was well in the market at Belmont first-up but looked a run short in stronger company. She has more to give and may appreciate the longer sprint. FLAG HIGH (10) resumes, and she's shown enough to consider. Has had a soft Lark Hill trial, and CJP is a positive jockey booking. It won't be a surprise if she races well.
